caption: A series of news broadcast frames features Nitish Kumar, the Chief Minister of Bihar, surrounded by several men in a crowded outdoor setting. Nitish Kumar wears a black vest over a white shirt, while other men around him are dressed in suits or traditional attire. In the first frame, a group of people are seen greeting and interacting, with some wearing garlands. As the sequence progresses, the camera zooms in on Nitish Kumar, who appears to be speaking or listening while surrounded by colleagues and reporters. Each frame includes a "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a "BREAKING" or "BREAKING NEWS" banner in yellow and red. Text overlays in Hindi appear at the top and side, including phrases such as "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?", and "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". Small portraits of individuals like "संतोष सुमन" and "विजय चौधरी" are visible in the side panels.
